zh.lifeSummary: 當Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne於1022年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維賽希時，他的父親Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille19歲，母親Judith de Nantes27歲。他於1046年12月23日與Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1084年4月13日在法國布-度-o享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne于1022年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維賽希时，他的父亲Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille19岁，母亲Judith de Nantes27岁。他于1046年12月23日与Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1084年4月13日在法国布-度-o享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hoël
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, composed of two different Hebrew elements, Yah(weh) and El, both of which mean ‘God’ the implication of the name is that the Hebrew God, Yahweh, is the only true god. This is a common name in the Bible, being borne by, among others, one of King David's ‘mighty men’ (1 Chronicles 11:38), and a minor prophet who lived in the 8th century bc . The name has been perennially popular as a Jewish name; it was also taken up by the Puritans and other Christian fundamentalists. The name has long been in regular use in North America but was uncommon in Britain until the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American singer and entertainer Joel Grey ( b. 1932 ), the West Indian cricketer Joel Garner ( b. 1952 ), and the American film director Joel Coen ( b. 1954 ). The French form Joël is also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne was born in 1022, in Visseiche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, was 19 and his mother, Judith de Nantes, was 27. He married Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany on 23 December 1046, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 13 April 1084, in Bouches-du-Rhône, France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne est né en 1022, à Visseiche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Judith de Nantes, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany le 23 décembre 1046, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1084, à Bouches-du-Rhône, France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne 1022 in Visseiche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille 19 und seine Mutter Judith de Nantes 27. Er hat am 23. Dezember 1046 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. April 1084 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Bouches-du-Rhône, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne è nato il nel 1022 nel Visseiche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Judith de Nantes, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany il 23 dicembre 1046, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1084, nel Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagneが1022年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィセイチェで生まれた時，父Alain III Craignart de Cornouailleは19歳，母Judith de Nantesは27歳であった。1046年12月23日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでHawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittanyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1084年4月13日にフランスボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne(이)가 1022년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비세이체에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de Nantes(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1046년 12월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1084년 4월 13일 프랑스 부체스-드-ho니에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne nasceu em 1022, em Visseiche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Nantes, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany em 23 de dezembro de 1046, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1084, em Bouches-du-Rhône, França, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne родился в 1022 г. в местности виссич, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith de Nantes, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany 23 декабря 1046 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 13 апреля 1084 г. в местности боучес-ду-рoн, Франция в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hoël de Cornouaille Comte de Kernev Duke de Bretagne nació en 1022, en Visseiche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Judith de Nantes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Hawise de Bretagne Duchess of Brittany el 23 de diciembre de 1046, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1084, en Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia, a la edad de 62 años.
